title: Quiz Platform
description: Built a full-stack quiz platform with JWT authentication, category-based quizzes, scoring, real-time analytics, and scalable REST APIs using MongoDB.

title: Gadget Fixing Platform
description: Built a scalable repair management system with real-time tracking, optimized RESTful APIs using MongoDB indexing, and enhanced UI functionality with React.

title: Hotel Booking Website
description: A complete hotel booking solution with user authentication, room catalog, booking management, and payment integration. Built with MERN stack for seamless performance.
focusedOn: Frontend | Backend | REST APIs | Payment Integration

title: Style Living Interior Platform
description: Built an interior design platform with automated form processing using Google Sheets API and backend services powered by Node.js.
